channel.title: StarCraft II News & Patches
channel.description: Latest StarCraft II news, patch notes, and updates from Blizzard

item.title: Celebrate BlizzCon® 2026 With a Hoard of In-game Items
item.description:
[Announcement] Shop the BlizzCon Digital Bundles on Battle.net, available now through September 28.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.16b Hotfix Patch Notes
item.description:
[News] We are making changes for Patch 5.0.16 based on player data and feedback.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.16 Hotfix Patch Notes
item.description:
[News] We have made some adjustment for Patch 5.0.16 based on feedback and player data.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.16 Patch Notes
item.description:
[Patch Notes] Patch 5.0.16 has been released with map pool and economy updates, balance changes with expanding strategic variety across all three races, and overall quality of life improvements.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.16 PTR Update
item.description:
[News] We've added new and modified changes on PTR today. Check out the details here.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.16 PTR Patch Notes
item.description:
[News] Patch 5.0.16 has been pushed to PTR which features economy and balance changes with various bug fixes.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.15 Hotfix Patch Notes
item.description:
[Patch Notes] Patch 5.0.15 Hotfix has been released to address a few balance changes and bug fixes.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.15 Patch Notes
item.description:
[News] We are happy to bring 5.0.15 Live, which contains various balance changes, bug fixes, and quality of life improvements.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.15 PTR Update
item.description:
[News] We've added new and modified changes on PTR today. Check out the details here.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.15 PTR Patch Notes
item.description:
[News] We are excited to push Patch 5.0.15 to PTR which features various balance changes and bug fixes.

Blizzard

item.title: BlizzCon Returns In 2026
item.description:
[News] Our celebration of our universes, connection, and community is coming back to the Anaheim Convention Center next year.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.14 Patch Notes
item.description:
[News] We are pleased to release the final set of balance changes after several weeks of PTR testing.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft and StarCraft II have landed on Game Pass
item.description:
[News] We’re excited to welcome Game Pass members now joining us in the Koprulu Sector. While the entirety of the original StarCraft and StarCraft II’s multiplayer components are free-to-play, StarCraft: Remastered and StarCraft II: Campaign Collection are now available to anyone with a PC Game Pass or Game Pass Ultimate subscription.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.14 PTR Update
item.description:
[News] We would like make the adjustments for further testing. Check out the details here.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.14 PTR Patch Notes
item.description:
[News] We are happy to present the next major multiplayer balance update, featuring changes for 14 units and 10 buildings, as well as two new abilities.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.13 Patch Notes
item.description:
[Patch Notes] We happy to push 5.0.13 to which features a variety of Map Pool Updates and Balance.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.13 PTR Patch Notes
item.description:
[News] We are happy to push 5.0.13 to PTR which features a variety of Map Pool Updates and Balance.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.12 Patch Notes
item.description:
[Article] Patch 5.0.12 has arrived with balance changes, bug fixes, and map pool update.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.11 Hotfix 2 Patch Notes
item.description:
[Patch Notes] Patch 5.0.11 Hotfix 2 has been released with various bug fixes. Check out the detail!

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.11 Hotfix Patch Notes
item.description:
[News] Patch 5.0.11 Hotfix has arrived with bug fixes for Versus.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.11 Patch Notes
item.description:
[Patch Notes] Patch 5.0.11 has arrived, featuring a wide range of balance, quality of life changes and bug fixes, which were curated by our very own StarCraft II community!

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.11 PTR Patch Notes
item.description:
[News] We are excited to push Patch 5.0.11 to PTR which features various amounts of balance, bugfixes, and quality of life improvement done by our community members.

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.10 Hotfix Patch Notes
item.description:
[News] Patch 5.0.10 Hotfix has arrived which contains a number of co-op bugfixes that were gathered by the community. Check out the detail!

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.10 Patch Notes
item.description:
[Patch Notes] Patch 5.0.10 has arrived. Check out the detail!

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.9 PTR Patch Notes
item.description:
[Patch Notes] We've been working with community members and tournament organizers to put together a Balance Patch. You can check it out on the PTR now!

Blizzard

item.title: StarCraft II 5.0.7 Patch Notes
item.description:
[Patch Notes] Patch 5.0.7 has arrived. Check out the detail!

Blizzard
